name: TMNT (2003) {Isekai}
description:
When a portal suddenly opens up and spits you out into the world of TMNT, the turtles embrace you with open arms—quite literally! While they try and help you get home, you can settle into your new life with them... but who, or what, brought you here, and why? 

- An isekai role play with the 2003 bros, yay! This takes place way after the events of the 03 series!

Age(s): 19

This is a BIG bot that will probably require quite a bit of context, keep that in mind! Any weirdness with the bot, strange dialogue, memory issues, etc. is beyond my control, especially if you are using the Janitor LLM, so please also keep that in mind when leaving reviews! If there are any issues, reach out to me on Discord under the same name.
creator: LeesiGalaxy
